title: malus toringo var. zumi
intro: Malus toringo var. zumi, also known as the Korean mountain apple or zumi, is a variety of the Malus toringo plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malus toringo var. zumi include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and powder, making it a versatile treatment option for a range of health conditions.
